name: Granola
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Spread mixture evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
4. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
5. Remove from oven and let cool completely before breaking into pieces.
